landing.step2Desc: Complete skill assessments and upload required documents for verification

landing.employersSubtitle: Access a pool of verified, work-ready candidates from Uzbekistan
landing.footerAboutText: ISHLA.UZ is an international employment platform connecting qualified Uzbek specialists with employers worldwide.

home.heroSubtitle: Connecting businesses with qualified professionals — fast, reliable, and transparent
home.footerDesc: Worldwide employment platform. Connecting businesses with qualified professionals.

faqItems.q1: How do I start looking for a job on ISHLA.UZ?
faqItems.a1: Register on the platform, fill in your profile and create a resume. After that, you can search for vacancies, apply for them and receive offers from employers.
faqItems.q2: Can I find work abroad through ISHLA.UZ?
faqItems.a2: Yes, our platform offers vacancies in over 30 countries, including South Korea, Germany, Japan, Turkey, Poland and others. We support the entire employment process.
faqItems.q3: How much does it cost to post a vacancy?
faqItems.a3: Basic vacancy posting is free. Paid plans are available for expanded promotion and access to the resume database. Details can be found in the Pricing section.
faqItems.q4: How can an employer find employees?
faqItems.a4: Register as an employer, post a vacancy and receive applications from candidates. You can also independently search for specialists in our resume database.
faqItems.q5: What documents are needed for working abroad?
faqItems.a5: The set of documents depends on the destination country. Usually a passport, medical certificate and qualification confirmation are required. Our specialists will help prepare the complete document package.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Frequently asked questions and contact information
help.reportSent: Your message has been sent. We will get back to you soon.

q1.question: How do I register on the platform?
q1.answer: Click the 'Register' button on the homepage, choose your role, fill in your personal details and create a password. After registration, complete your profile.

q2.question: What documents are needed for employment abroad?
q2.answer: Typically you need: a valid passport, medical certificate, criminal record clearance, 3x4 photos, and copies of educational diplomas. The exact list depends on the destination country.

q3.question: How long does the visa process take?
q3.answer: Visa processing time varies by country: 2-4 weeks for Turkey, 4-8 weeks for South Korea, 3-6 weeks for Saudi Arabia. We will keep you informed about your application status at every step.

q4.question: Is there a fee for using the platform?
q4.answer: Registration and job search on the platform are completely free for candidates. All costs related to visa processing and travel are covered by the employer.

q5.question: How are employers verified?
q5.answer: All employers go through a KYC (Know Your Customer) verification process. We check company registration documents, licenses, and employment history. Only verified employers can post job orders.

q6.question: What should I do if I have problems at my workplace?
q6.answer: Contact our support team immediately through the chat section or by phone. We have a dedicated team that handles workplace issues and ensures your rights are protected according to the employment contract.
